title: Tiny Knight
aesthetic: 16x16 fantasy pixel-art, cool steel palette with a warm gold accent
_comment: The art bible: one palette + reusable shape motifs every sprite shares. Coherence here is the visual analogue of a soundtrack's shared key + motifs. The leitmotif move is the PALETTE SWAP — see sprites/knight-dusk.json, which is the knight in different colours and nothing else.

knight._comment: The hero's pose, stated in full here once (like a soundtrack stating its main theme). The outer black outline is NOT drawn — the engine's auto-outline traces the silhouette, so motifs only carry interior shading.

crest._comment: A small gold emblem — the repeated SHAPE motif. It rides on the knight's chest and reappears, enlarged, on the banner: the same shape with two faces, the way a leitmotif recurs across cues.

slash._comment: A bright crescent swoosh that trails the sword on the strike frame (the spark on the action frame only).

sword._comment: The knight's weapon, drawn pointing UP (tip at top). The attack animation rotates it 90 (overhead -> horizontal swing) — the engine's transforms doing the work instead of redrawing each frame.
